disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
I need 10,000 signatures on my emergency petition to PROTECT Social Security and Medicare from Trump's heartless budget cuts. Will you sign on before midnight tonight? >>
---
| | [**TRUMP BUDGET SLASHES MEDICARE AND SOCIAL SECURITY**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b644/18e32a7f/4e8004fe/7b223572/3732896457/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/medicare-survey?source=20200320_em_pet_b1_ssanvbrl_all_ia") [I'm appalled. I will NOT allow President Trump to rip health care from our seniors when they need it most. I need 10,000 signatures on my emergency petition to PROTECT Social Security and Medicare from his heartless budget cuts. Will you sign on before midnight tonight? >> ](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b644/18e32a7f/4e8004fe/7b223572/3732896457/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/medicare-survey?source=20200320_em_pet_b1_ssanvbrl_all_ia") | I'm absolutely disgusted. President Trump's budget completely SLASHES Social Security and Medicare -- [**at a time when seniors are relying on these benefits more than ever.**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b644/18e32a7f/4e8004fe/7b223572/3732896457/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/medicare-survey?source=20200320_em_pet_b1_ssanvbrl_all_ia") [**_BEFORE MIDNIGHT: I need 10,000 signatures on my emergency petition to send Trump a crystal-clear message: Our seniors have paid into Medicare and Social Security their entire lives. We will NOT let you rip these live-saving benefits away when they need it most. Will you sign my petition before midnight tonight? >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b644/18e32a7f/4e8004fe/7b223572/3732896457/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/medicare-survey?source=20200320_em_pet_b1_ssanvbrl_all_ia")
** ** [****NAME** : dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b644/18e32a7f/4e8004fe/7b223572/3732896457/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/medicare-survey?source=20200320_em_pet_b1_ssanvbrl_all_ia")**** ** ** | **[SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b644/18e32a7f/4e8004fe/7b223572/3732896457/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/medicare-survey?source=20200320_em_pet_b1_ssanvbrl_all_ia")**
---

I'm completely horrified.

President Trump just released a despicable new budget.

\-- It [**SLASHES**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b644/18e32a7f/4e8004fe/7b223572/3732896457/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/medicare-survey?source=20200320_em_pet_b1_ssanvbrl_all_ia") Medicare from seniors who've spent their entire lives paying into it.

\-- It [**GUTS**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b644/18e32a7f/4e8004fe/7b223572/3732896457/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/medicare-survey?source=20200320_em_pet_b1_ssanvbrl_all_ia") Social Security from seniors who are relying on it to make ends meet.

\-- It [**THREATENS**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b644/18e32a7f/4e8004fe/7b223572/3732896457/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/medicare-survey?source=20200320_em_pet_b1_ssanvbrl_all_ia") our vulnerable seniors' health care at a time when they need it most.

[**_I can 't overstate the urgency -- I need 10,000 signatures on my emergency petition to PROTECT these critical programs before it's too late. Our seniors need us to have their backs in this moment. Will you sign your name before midnight tonight to STOP Trump's heartless cuts to Social Security and Medicare? >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b644/18e32a7f/4e8004fe/7b223572/3732896457/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/medicare-survey?source=20200320_em_pet_b1_ssanvbrl_all_ia")

Thank you for taking a critical stand,

Ben Ray

---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b644/18e32a7f/4e8004fe/7b223573/3732896457/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b644/18e32a7f/4e8004fe/7b223570/3732896457/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b644/18e32a7f/4e8004fe/7b223571/3732896457/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement? **[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b644/18e32a7f/4e8004fe/7b223576/3732896457/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b644/18e32a7f/4e8004fe/7b223577/3732896457/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails")

If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand.
Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b644/18e32a7f/4e8004fe/7b223574/3732896457/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben

Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: Christy Smith
subject: During times of stress, let's help each other where we can
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

While we're spending time at home reflecting on the ongoing crisis, it's easy to feel powerless in this situation. We are doing a lot of worrying -- worrying about the health and safety of our loved ones, worrying about the people who have been laid off from their jobs, worrying about the students who will be home from school for who knows how long.

But when I start to worry too much, I try to think of all of the ways I can make a difference during these times. There are so many great organizations doing crucial work right now -- including ones right here in CA-25. And by supporting them, we can help continue their important missions and help our neighbors, too.

**In light of this, we have made a custom ActBlue Charities page in which you can give to one or all of these groups.** Each one of these California non-profit organizations is doing incredibly important work in our communities at this time and can use all the help they can get. 100% of donations will go to the non-profits.

**[If you are able to during this difficult time, please make a contribution to one or all of these groups right here in CA-25 to help them during the COVID-19 pandemic. Any bit you give helps.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b80a/29776869/ae90e94/569fad35/3858384586/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMTlfY2hhcml0eXJhaXNlci1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cs-covid19?refcode=em20_200319_charityraiser-full")** [GIVE NOW](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b80a/29776869/ae90e94/569fad35/3858384586/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMTlfY2hhcml0eXJhaXNlci1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cs-covid19?refcode=em20_200319_charityraiser-full") Here is some information about each organization we are supporting:

**Santa Clarita Valley Food Pantry**
The Santa Clarita Valley Food Pantry helps people throughout the valley. They aid families and elderly residents, providing them with food, personal hygiene items, and household goods.

**Samaritan Center of Simi Valley**
This organization provides support by way of food, housing, education, and love. The Samaritan Center is almost entirely run on support and generosity from members of the community.

**Meet Each Need with Dignity (MEND)**
Located in the San Fernando Valley, MEND has been helping people in the area for nearly 50 years. During this especially busy time, they are focusing on food distribution and care for people facing homelessness during the pandemic.

**South Antelope Valley Emergency Services (SAVES)**
SAVES is dedicated to reducing hunger among low-income working families and elderly, disabled and homeless folks in the South Antelope Valley communities. They provide help with food, assistance in working with government agencies, and education.

**When we all step up and work together, we can accomplish so much and help each other out.**

**[If you can, will you chip in to help your neighbors who are struggling right now?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b80a/29776869/ae90e94/569fad35/3858384586/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMTlfY2hhcml0eXJhaXNlci1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cs-covid19?refcode=em20_200319_charityraiser-full")** [GIVE NOW](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b80a/29776869/ae90e94/569fad35/3858384586/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMTlfY2hhcml0eXJhaXNlci1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cs-covid19?refcode=em20_200319_charityraiser-full") Stay safe and healthy. I'm thinking of you all during this time.

\-- Christy |
---|---|---

| | Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress.
---|---
|
This email was sent by **[Christy Smith](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b80a/29776869/ae90e94/569fad36/3858384586/VEsD/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/")**
777 S. Figueroa Street, Suite 4050, Los Angeles, CA 90017-5864.

If you no longer want to hear from Christy Smith, [**click here to get off all our lists instantly.**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b80a/29776869/ae90e94/569fad37/3858384586/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Questions or concerns? [**Contact us here**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b80a/29776869/ae90e94/569fad30/3858384586/VEsB/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/contact"). |

subject: Breaking: Gov. Holcomb Announces Primary Moved to June 2
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Today, Governor Eric Holcomb announced big news: Due to COVID-19 concerns, the primary election will be moved to June 2, 2020. Keeping Hoosiers...

Breaking: Gov. Holcomb Announces Primary Moved to June 2
https://www.facebook.com/indgop/posts/10156854956791875?__xts__[0]=68.ARDvQeuu0RUL56uBPm9Nbw0zZSxd4GILIWO7GZ-jzgqf3J6ybxdklJVpxjirXQKVd49Km2KS8wH5fVotss3KjqpeIgBU--hmFzKGdqrdjpGlvwYQE7Gr3tEsaJkqBNMZpEf__RJ9S0A3RH0JuDTuO64SJk3wc7vVlDoldnbSNMAMCj619orbO09saz__wmtJI8iAvIZ3zxO03yFDZgunzEPOLuvwuuhhoaCBH4n2IPF8GPR4cdl_vVJwEV6x0KNsUPwK64J4stamV5I3wKPumQQQ55Wh9ZBWUnriJREngGaCR8Zq-Yy9ilMp1MAuDhW5fjUgsp7-OQlk1K0uPjq_Hkhd9x_29Qdw9w89FZQDhTA8fPnz7sQtw9t6uOH44zXxpWBxB3gEkMkrfa7dGh_DycAdMogtK0zMfhgc6_FmkehmNF4x-I32snBaBogB_PnYOP_qfuhATUXyC8aUGvai_LKvFYWJl2UkhitvFx7sBgpHE3GuT2Ul&__tn__=-R&mc_cid=50842ca15f&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
Today, Governor Eric Holcomb announced big news: Due to COVID-19 concerns, the primary election will be moved from May 5 to June 2, 2020.

Keeping Hoosiers safe is a top priority for Governor Holcomb, and by delaying our primary, we'll properly balance the safety of county employees, poll workers, and voters with Hoosiers' right to elect their citizens in a free and open election.

--> Watch What He Said Here <-- (https://www.facebook.com/indgop/posts/10156854956791875?__xts__[0]=68.ARDvQeuu0RUL56uBPm9Nbw0zZSxd4GILIWO7GZ-jzgqf3J6ybxdklJVpxjirXQKVd49Km2KS8wH5fVotss3KjqpeIgBU--hmFzKGdqrdjpGlvwYQE7Gr3tEsaJkqBNMZpEf__RJ9S0A3RH0JuDTuO64SJk3wc7vVlDoldnbSNMAMCj619orbO09saz__wmtJI8iAvIZ3zxO03yFDZgunzEPOLuvwuuhhoaCBH4n2IPF8GPR4cdl_vVJwEV6x0KNsUPwK64J4stamV5I3wKPumQQQ55Wh9ZBWUnriJREngGaCR8Zq-Yy9ilMp1MAuDhW5fjUgsp7-OQlk1K0uPjq_Hkhd9x_29Qdw9w89FZQDhTA8fPnz7sQtw9t6uOH44zXxpWBxB3gEkMkrfa7dGh_DycAdMogtK0zMfhgc6_FmkehmNF4x-I32snBaBogB_PnYOP_qfuhATUXyC8aUGvai_LKvFYWJl2UkhitvFx7sBgpHE3GuT2Ul&__tn__=-R&mc_cid=50842ca15f&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
--> Read Details About the Change Here<-- (https://calendar.in.gov/site/gov/event/gov-holcomb-and-secretary-of-state-lawson-announce-primary-election-to-move-to-june-2/?mc_cid=50842ca15f&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
This wasn't a step taken lightly -- and it's all centered around making sure Hoosiers can still exercise their right to vote during this coronavirus pandemic. It was a joint decision made by Governor Holcomb, Secretary of State Connie Lawson, Indiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer and the Indiana Democrats.

A few additional fast facts about the Primary Day change:
* Any registered voter will be able to vote via an absentee mail-in ballot.
* The window for requesting an absentee ballot will remain open through 12 day out from the new primary election date.
* Medical professionals will be eligible members of traveling boards to allow nursing home and hospital patients to vote.
* Family members will be allowed to deliver absentee ballots.

We know these are difficult times for our fellow Hoosiers across the state, and we thank you for your work -- both in big ways, and in small ways. Together, we'll look out for each other and get through this marathon.
Watch Now: Gov. Holcomb Announces Primary Changes (https://www.facebook.com/indgop/posts/10156854956791875?__xts__[0]=68.ARDvQeuu0RUL56uBPm9Nbw0zZSxd4GILIWO7GZ-jzgqf3J6ybxdklJVpxjirXQKVd49Km2KS8wH5fVotss3KjqpeIgBU--hmFzKGdqrdjpGlvwYQE7Gr3tEsaJkqBNMZpEf__RJ9S0A3RH0JuDTuO64SJk3wc7vVlDoldnbSNMAMCj619orbO09saz__wmtJI8iAvIZ3zxO03yFDZgunzEPOLuvwuuhhoaCBH4n2IPF8GPR4cdl_vVJwEV6x0KNsUPwK64J4stamV5I3wKPumQQQ55Wh9ZBWUnriJREngGaCR8Zq-Yy9ilMp1MAuDhW5fjUgsp7-OQlk1K0uPjq_Hkhd9x_29Qdw9w89FZQDhTA8fPnz7sQtw9t6uOH44zXxpWBxB3gEkMkrfa7dGh_DycAdMogtK0zMfhgc6_FmkehmNF4x-I32snBaBogB_PnYOP_qfuhATUXyC8aUGvai_LKvFYWJl2UkhitvFx7sBgpHE3GuT2Ul&__tn__=-R&mc_cid=50842ca15f&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

clean_body: Today, Governor Eric Holcomb announced big news: Due to COVID-19 concerns, the primary election will be moved to June 2, 2020. Keeping Hoosiers... Breaking: Gov. Holcomb Announces Primary Moved to June 2 ] Today, Governor Eric Holcomb announced big news: Due to COVID-19 concerns, the primary election will be moved from May 5 to June 2, 2020. Keeping Hoosiers safe is a top priority for Governor Holcomb, and by delaying our primary, we'll properly balance the safety of county employees, poll workers, and voters with Hoosiers' right to elect their citizens in a free and open election. --> Watch What He Said Here <-- (]) --> Read Details About the Change Here<-- (]) This wasn't a step taken lightly -- and it's all centered around making sure Hoosiers can still exercise their right to vote during this coronavirus pandemic. It was a joint decision made by Governor Holcomb, Secretary of State Connie Lawson, Indiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer and the Indiana Democrats. A few additional fast facts about the Primary Day change: Any registered voter will be able to vote via an absentee mail-in ballot. The window for requesting an absentee ballot will remain open through 12 day out from the new primary election date. Medical professionals will be eligible members of traveling boards to allow nursing home and hospital patients to vote. Family members will be allowed to deliver absentee ballots. We know these are difficult times for our fellow Hoosiers across the state, and we thank you for your work -- both in big ways, and in small ways. Together, we'll look out for each other and get through this marathon. Watch Now: Gov. Holcomb Announces Primary Changes (]) ============================================================ Twitter (]) Facebook (]) Website (]) Copyright © 2020 Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc., All rights reserved.

Friends, I have some really good news to share with you! Earlier this morning, I was endorsed by The Susan B. Anthony List, one of the largest pro-life groups in America.
I am battle-tested and ready to take my staunchly pro-life ideology to the halls of Congress. I will do everything in my power to be a voice for those who do not yet have a voice.
We can longer afford to remain silent and stagnant. We must fight for life!

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Mississippi Legislature COVID-19 Briefing
body:
What new laws do you think the Mississippi legislature should consider?|
---|---
| | |
---
| | [](https://4gzmh.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/7_ILJtHacBiu7JlovBIvGVhOZz4k5sby-1-fkQxZmWo7uOuzc0hcjRtGvjTP5uKl03ALPyK1RcmyfKT1KVRtn397_18qSZxUTunx-couEugvrvkoJKb39b2CxhrSiyKUwomM4xmOX3eFZDoJSYn_TpmIkAtO4KvjSoDGFQ-0QAus2chGSlCzJpoI)
---
| | | |
---
**From Your Capitol - COVID-19 Update**
| |
---
| | | |
---
On Tuesday, March 17, the Mississippi House of Representatives suspended the legislative session until April 1 at 2 p.m., or a date mutually agreed upon by Speaker of the House Philip Gunn and Lt. Governor Delbert Hosemann if necessary. This suspension is out abundance of caution for the members and staff due to the COVID-19 pandemic. House Concurrent Resolution 65 extends the session by 30 days, allows for reconvening on April 1 or upon determination by the House and Senate and adjusts the session deadlines to conform with the extended schedule. HC 65 passed by a vote of 82-38. Speaker Philip Gunn in a press conference Tuesday afternoon said, “We want to make sure we not only set a good example for the citizens of the state, but also protect those that work here and those who are dispersed to various parts of the state.” **Legislative Briefing, Friday March 20, 2020**
* We had 48 new cases reported yesterday (March 19, 2020). We are now approaching 100 cases statewide. We had our first death in Hancock County.
* There appears to be a shortage of supplies from the federal government and this is affecting some hospitals. The demand in some areas exceeds what is available (We have heard from Jackson County and Pearl River County). The Department of Health is aware of this and is working with Washington to get more supplies. Mississippi Emergency Management Associaiton (MEMA) is in charge of distributing the supplies. The Speaker of the House plans to participate in a briefing with MEMA and the Department of Health later this morning, March 20, 2020.
* A request of the Governor has been made to issue an executive order waiving the one-week waiting period for employees to receive benefits. Also requested the Governor to issue an executive order prohibiting the ratings for employers from going up because of the increase in unemployment claims. Both of these measures should provide some financial relief and protection to our employers and employees.
* The legislature continues to talk with state economist, and Department of Revenue (DOR) in an effort to get the best economic outlook possible. The legislature plans to have weekly meetings with them to monitor our economic situation. This will be crucial as we consider what relief we will be able to provide our citizens and as we begin to prepare the budget.

**From Drew Snyder, Director of Medicaid** Several key features of the Mississippi Medicaid emercency telehealth policy announced today;
* Allows telehealth services in the home
* Allows more Medicaid providers to serve as distant site providers, including FQHCs and RHCs.
* Relaxes audio-only telphonic limitations.

Use this link for more information from Mississippi Medicaid and the COVID-19 Virus. [https://medicaid.ms.gov/coronavirus-updates/](https://4gzmh.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/G1F0vtoMETw0erMNCefqebXNfX3FciwsGWg9SNUhTJnZaGRdcjQjxPNJVJwH8ZzAsc8HF7kSHi35rGJ2L-Z-UEnrKyVBLR4ZY76F8u20e1Q6rffFM0vJmAOUpfaViK4eFXDaTQfMvx7C9oeGBpMcsjLJVBl50180pDEDWSm7v0eComESRIhpvxytrhmIbjg9BA) **From Shad White, Mississippi State Auditor** Here are a few types of fraud schemes that become more common during emergencies;
* Cyber fraud. Hackers will ask you to open emails and click on links, promising information or help during the emergency. This is how they get access to your system and your personal data. Do not open emails from parties you do not trust.
* Charity Fraud. Parties pretending to be legitimate charities will ask you to donate. Be wary of donating cash and Google any charity that asks for money before giving.

See this website for more information about preventing fraud during this emergency. [https://www.acfe.com/disasterfraud/](https://4gzmh.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/hkpm2j0kvL17caFlIsCh9cMJvC1JNoHd9FrXQ-S9hsNTDvVx7LwYd9C68fGRK1S2SEstcHAQE0fau9mFw1iHOstC-6Ei1aXZp8avVwxYLhOa24uU2ioZRpAhaKRXZ5Rj6OGr16IGCNZBl4fz1E7lvq9z8fFBkLvY9TzEgvYbxsWfpF-zuymRHw)
| [Continue Reading](https://4gzmh.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/voXUXweTQoqi2ZQ0stzZbSwm_KhQVHFrpMRDaBUV241MbuwHFW5qqmhabGxnap-k0D6VChmf56XNhqeL4KpHjmzAAUMwVlbBffZn0AimIZqc0juYqM4rH7ziVyKdsweqj_R_5YfzclZ3vL1tGCwf7fSsQ0pCgaqakbb0-E8QrejTsuNcZRKrdYzzfG47aJc92eKA5Qgp6dYUaUBqUOYDwAzB9vzXTy4WFevJ11I8)

name: Congressman Al Green
subject: Fwd: How is COVID-19 impacting your community?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/AQ2uv_8dY9UR50KxDEQs1Wmx2huO0DHcAQauhbh-RQI=/o-jqfx0nDQ7Bk1_iRFy3-uV5pXIMu9giYPGN-nyXhvQ=)
---
| Folks, I reached out yesterday to ask you to share your concerns regarding COVID-19 with me. Thank you to everyone who has done so -- I will continue to carry your stories and your input with me as I fight for solutions in Congress. If you haven't submitted a comment via our community forum, I urge you to raise your voice and let me know what you need from your elected leaders to carry yourself, your family, and your community through this public health emergency. Your voice is needed in these trying times. | **[SUBMIT A COMMENT ⇨](https://act.myngp.com/el/AQ2uv_8dY9UR50KxDEQs1Wmx2huO0DHcAQauhbh-RQI=/dA6tjPWufM_7llAX8OmmuYku5tEsNPmYHum0VcMjjss=)**
---
Thank you, and be safe. We will get through this together.
In service and solidarity,
\-- Congressman Al Green

\----- PREVIOUS MESSAGE -----
Folks,
I know we are living through uncertain times. There are now at least 160 positive cases of COVID-19 in my home state of Texas, 3 people have died, and Governor Abbott has activated the Texas National Guard to help handle this developing crisis.
I have heard from folks who are worried about passing the virus on to vulnerable friends and family members. I have heard from parents struggling to find childcare, suddenly-unemployed workers wondering how they're going to pay for rent and groceries, and people experiencing homelessness who have nowhere to go.
**I want to hear how COVID-19 is affecting you, your family, and your community, and what you need right now from your elected leaders.[So I've opened a community forum where you can send me your thoughts and concerns regarding this public health emergency.](https://act.myngp.com/el/AQ2uv_8dY9UR50KxDEQs1Wmx2huO0DHcAQauhbh-RQI=/dA6tjPWufM_7llAX8OmmuYku5tEsNPmYHum0VcMjjss=)**
**[SUBMIT A COMMENT ⇨](https://act.myngp.com/el/AQ2uv_8dY9UR50KxDEQs1Wmx2huO0DHcAQauhbh-RQI=/dA6tjPWufM_7llAX8OmmuYku5tEsNPmYHum0VcMjjss=)**
---
I have been working around the clock in Congress to pass bipartisan solutions to slow the spread of this virus and alleviate the burdens it has brought.
Last Wednesday, we passed an $8.3 billion emergency bill to fund vaccine research and support state and local agencies fighting this virus on the front lines. Then, on Friday, we passed a second relief package which includes paid leave, expanded food assistance, extended unemployment insurance, and free coverage for COVID-19 testing.
[**I understand that despite these steps we 've taken, you may still be experiencing anxiety around the spread of COVID-19 and the effect it will have on our communities and our country. I hope you will take a moment to share your concerns with me, so that I can continue to bring your voice to the table as we work to protect the health and safety of all Americans.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/AQ2uv_8dY9UR50KxDEQs1Wmx2huO0DHcAQauhbh-RQI=/dA6tjPWufM_7llAX8OmmuYku5tEsNPmYHum0VcMjjss=)
**[SUBMIT A COMMENT ⇨](https://act.myngp.com/el/AQ2uv_8dY9UR50KxDEQs1Wmx2huO0DHcAQauhbh-RQI=/dA6tjPWufM_7llAX8OmmuYku5tEsNPmYHum0VcMjjss=)**
---
Thank you for sharing your voice. I will be in touch soon.
\-- Congressman Al Green
P.S.[**For the most up-to-date information on the COVID-19 pandemic, visit the CDC 's website here.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/AQ2uv_8dY9UR50KxDEQs1Wmx2huO0DHcAQauhbh-RQI=/5BvNrcAFNSmq4NHhLy-nUPA9quSvzF1HByoxKJwf3zU=) In the meantime, you can help flatten the curve by washing your hands frequently and practicing social distancing. I will continue to be in touch as the situation changes.
* * *
| | Congressman Al Green has served the people of Texas' 9th district for 15 years. He is a progressive leader in Washington and was the first Member of Congress to introduce articles of impeachment against President Trump on the House floor.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because we want to keep you fully informed about Al's work for justice, accountability, and progress. If you'd prefer not to hear from us, you can [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/AQ2uv_8dY9UR50KxDEQs1Wmx2huO0DHcAQauhbh-RQI=/u7W-rCkRXXeGxiVgpA6K0HUEmuvD_tNLCx7DNqF8S20=) here.
---

| Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress
---

Houston TX 77256-6761 United States

Last Wednesday, we passed an $8.3 billion emergency bill to fund vaccine research and support state and local agencies fighting this virus on the front lines. Then, on Friday, we passed a second relief package which includes paid leave, expanded food assistance, extended unemployment insurance, and free coverage for COVID-19 testing. = = Thank you for sharing your voice. I will be in touch soon. \-- Congressman Al Green P.S.= In the meantime, you can help flatten the curve by washing your hands frequently and practicing social distancing. I will continue to be in touch as the situation changes. * | | Congressman Al Green has served the people of Texas' 9th district for 15 years. He is a progressive leader in Washington and was the first Member of Congress to introduce articles of impeachment against President Trump on the House floor.

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16322185/173209528/-631061264?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGU2ODY5NC1mZDZhLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ae8L5L61LtcNdJrX9xvl3ntmR5OXyMd8biTZQezKB8g=&emci=95c08ef6-f86a-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&emdi=a4e68694-fd6a-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&ceid=194769) Team, The stock market has suffered massive losses that have wiped out college funds, retirement accounts, and large portions of rainy day savings for millions of American families. In the midst of this financial crisis, bombshell reports were published in the past 24 hours showing that Republican Senators Richard Burr of North Carolina and Kelly Loeffler of Georgia dumped millions of dollars of stocks in January and February within days of receiving private briefings from health officials about the economic turmoil looming just over the horizon due to spread of the coronavirus pandemic. Kelly Loeffler, whose husband is the chairman of the New York Stock Exchange, doubled down on this seemingly corrupt action by actually investing in technology companies specializing in telework solutions—just weeks before tens of millions of Americans began working from home to help slow the spread of this disease. They were briefed about COVID-19. They knew what was coming. And on the backs of American families, they moved quickly to make a quick buck for themselves. And they did this while seriously downplaying the threat of the virus to their constituents and the American people. Look friend, bipartisanship is critical as governments at the local, state, and federal level work to legislate our way out of this crisis. But Republican Senators continue to show us their true colors and remind us how important it is to get better, more moral leaders into public office through the political process—even at this extraordinary time. [**As campaigns are starved for cash right now and fighting to stay alive, will you rush a donation right now to support our work to elect service-driven leaders and flip Republican seats in the House and Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16322186/173209529/-333616605?refcode=20200320-burr-loeffler&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGU2ODY5NC1mZDZhLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ae8L5L61LtcNdJrX9xvl3ntmR5OXyMd8biTZQezKB8g=) What Kelly Loeffler and Richard Burr have done is unconscionable, and we need you now more than ever. name: Warnock for Georgia
subject: Outrageous corruption
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
The character of our democracy is at stake here.
| | |
---
Friend,

The character of our democracy is at stake in Georgia's Senate race.
Our Republican opponent, Kelly Loeffler, is spending $20 million of her personal fortune to try and buy this seat.
**And if that wasn 't bad enough, news just broke that she's been cashing in on the coronavirus crisis - selling millions worth of stocks _just after_ she received a private, all-senators briefing on the dangers of the epidemic.**
Friend, outrageous corruption like this has no place in our government. We simply cannot let someone buy a U.S. Senate seat - and then use that office to make herself even richer. We _have_ to beat Kelly Loeffler and flip this seat blue.
**But here 's the harsh reality: The only way we'll overcome Kelly Loeffler's millions is if grassroots donors pitch in to support her Democratic opponent.**
Reverend Raphael Warnock is the strong leader Democrats need to flip this seat and take back the Senate. A pastor and community leader, he's running a people-powered campaign to restore moral leadership to Washington.
We're facing our first official FEC deadline of the campaign, and right now we're on track to fall just short of our goal.[ **_Please, will you chip in right away - as much as you can afford - to defeat Kelly Loeffler, flip this seat blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?_**](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk118-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your monthly donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk118-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&express_lane=true&amount=5")
---

---
| | [Donate $50](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk118-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
| | [Donate another amount](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk118-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")
---
The stakes in this race couldn't be higher: Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight confirms that Democrats CAN flip the Senate - but it will all come down to winning in Georgia.

The contrast in this race couldn't be clearer.
Reverend Warnock grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. He went on to earn a college degree and worked his way up to serving as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.'s church. Now he has the chance to become the first black senator this state has ever elected.
We are in the fight for the soul of our nation's democracy. It's a tough fight - but it's a fight we can win. If we're going to take back the Senate from corrupt leaders like Kelly Loeffler and Mitch McConnell, we need to win here in Georgia. But we can't get it done without support from grassroots folks like you.
**[_So please, friend, will you chip in right now - as much as you can afford - to defeat Kelly Loeffler, flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats? In a race this close, every dollar could make the difference between winning and losing - so thank you for pitching in._](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk118-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**
Thanks for being with us,

Warnock for Georgia
| | [Contribute](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk118-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")

|
---

| | This is a long email about why I think Steve Chabot has failed to lead our country forward. Steve Chabot has been failing our district -- and the working families in America -- for a long time with his callous votes.

It's no wonder he's voted to weaken Social Security, refused to address the climate crisis, and attempted to gut protections for those with preexisting conditions.

name: Senator Tina Smith
subject: Petition: Help me protect workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Friend, Last week, I introduced the Job Protection for Quarantined Individuals Act of 2020, which would protect quarantined workers from being fired or punished by employers amid the coronavirus. We need to do everything we can to lessen the fears in peoples’ minds. The health of their families and our community should be the number one priority. **That’s why me and many of my Senate colleagues want to provide clear protections for workers during this public health emergency — and why we’re fighting so hard to pass this critical piece of legislation.** **[I need 10,000 grassroots supporters (like you!) to demand protections for workers and send a powerful message back to Washington. Will you add your name to my petition before midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16323146/173220201/1160714349?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDEzN2MzOC0wMjZiLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fkE_MdxxRNWjVPFvFPyyGGP08AdPuxfQmv3yyoHhR2Y=&emci=bd137c38-026b-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&emdi=cd137c38-026b-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6227932)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16323147/173220202/1160714349?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDEzN2MzOC0wMjZiLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fkE_MdxxRNWjVPFvFPyyGGP08AdPuxfQmv3yyoHhR2Y=&emci=bd137c38-026b-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&emdi=cd137c38-026b-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6227932)
---
No worker should feel like they need to go into work sick out of fear they might lose their job. We need everyone to prioritize their health and their families.
During this incredibly difficult time, I want you to know I am fighting for you. I am doing everything I can to be a fierce advocate for all Minnesotans.
**[But, I need to know you are with me. Can you add your name to this petition real quick?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16323148/173220203/1160714349?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDEzN2MzOC0wMjZiLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fkE_MdxxRNWjVPFvFPyyGGP08AdPuxfQmv3yyoHhR2Y=&emci=bd137c38-026b-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&emdi=cd137c38-026b-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6227932)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16323149/173220204/1160714349?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDEzN2MzOC0wMjZiLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fkE_MdxxRNWjVPFvFPyyGGP08AdPuxfQmv3yyoHhR2Y=&emci=bd137c38-026b-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&emdi=cd137c38-026b-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6227932)
---
Thank you so much for your support! Please stay safe.
— Tina
Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota

That’s why me and many of my Senate colleagues want to provide clear protections for workers during this public health emergency — and why we’re fighting so hard to pass this critical piece of legislation. | No worker should feel like they need to go into work sick out of fear they might lose their job. We need everyone to prioritize their health and their families. During this incredibly difficult time, I want you to know I am fighting for you. I am doing everything I can to be a fierce advocate for all Minnesotans. Thank you so much for your support! Please stay safe. — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: We can all help slow the spread of the coronavirus
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Our country is staring down the most difficult challenge we have faced since World War II. The coronavirus crisis poses a real threat to our health and economy, and requires a strong response -- from | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525677/45c30650/1f7c96a69/66e945d7/684787235/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Our country is staring down the most difficult challenge we have faced since World War II.

The coronavirus crisis poses a real threat to our health and economy, and requires a strong response -- from our government, but also from each of us.

It's natural to feel overwhelmed or powerless at a time like this, but we all have the power to help slow the spread of the coronavirus by taking simple steps. **[Here are a few pieces of guidance the CDC is giving right now:](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525677/45c30650/1f7c96a69/66e945d6/684787235/VEsE/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/prepare/prevention.html")**
* Wash your hands frequently. Take at least 20 seconds (about how long it takes to sing "Happy Birthday" twice).

* Avoid touching your face.

* Cover your mouth when you sneeze or cough.

* Disinfect things like doorknobs, tables, countertops, and light switches on a daily basis.

* Stay home as much as possible, and stay away from big crowds, especially if you're older or have another health condition -- like heart or lung disease, or diabetes, or a suppressed immune system -- that could make this disease even more dangerous.

Keep an eye out for more updates from the CDC and from your state and local health departments for updated guidance.

**Even if you're young and healthy, it is critical that you take all of these steps because they help protect the rest of your community.** You'll reduce the risk of unknowingly passing on the disease to someone else -- someone older and less healthy than you who might become seriously ill if they contract the coronavirus. Think of the grandparents, cancer patients, and others out there who are counting on you to help keep them safe.

Do everything you can to follow these guidelines and take care of yourself. And if you're able, please take care of your friends, your family, your neighbors, and anyone around you who might need a little extra help -- pick up groceries for an older neighbor or order takeout from a local restaurant that is struggling.

But "social distance" doesn't mean we should stop communicating. We need one another now more than ever. Keep checking in on people -- texting, emailing, calling, video chatting, whatever works, and whatever keeps you talking with the people who make you strong.

If we all take this seriously, we can limit the number of people who get sick all at the same time, and make it easier for our health system to deliver care to everyone who needs it.

Taking action as individuals and as local communities is critical, but of course it's not enough. **Our government needs to step up and treat the coronavirus as the public health and economic crisis that it is.[I've outlined an updated plan to do exactly that, including:](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525677/45c30650/1f7c96a69/66e945d9/684787235/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVAyNU9fTk9BX0NPVl9FXzIwMjAwMzIwX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com/plans/updated-plan-address-coronavirus?source=EMP25O_NOA_COV_E_20200320_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**
* Rapidly expand testing;

* Make sure every American can get the recommended care they need for testing, evaluation, and treatment of coronavirus at no cost;

* Help hospitals and local leaders expand treatment capacity and supplies of protective gear for our doctors and nurses, and

* Plugging the hole this will rip through our economy. I've proposed a $750 billion stimulus package -- including fully paid leave, unemployment insurance boosts, aid to state governments, funding for vaccine development, Social Security benefit increases, and student debt cancellation. Let's get money in people's hands so they can stay home if they're sick but still support the economy from the ground up.

I'll keep fighting in Washington to make sure our government takes this pandemic seriously and doesn't use it as a giveaway to big companies that leaves everyday people behind.

The Trump administration failed to prepare us for this pandemic. It's more important than ever for us to each do our part as citizens to support one another.

Now, I wish I could tell you that this crisis will be over by "X" date or within "Y" days.

But the reality is we just don't know.

For a while, it's going to be hard. For a lot of people, it's going to be really hard. But it won't last forever. And we do know this: **When we look out for each other, we make each other stronger. We get through times like these when we fight side by side.**

Elizabeth

| | | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525677/45c30650/1f7c96a69/66e945d8/684787235/VEsC/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.facebook.com/ElizabethWarren/") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525677/45c30650/1f7c96a69/66e945db/684787235/VEsD/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://twitter.com/ewarren") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525677/45c30650/1f7c96a69/66e945da/684787235/VEsA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.instagram.com/elizabethwarren/") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525677/45c30650/1f7c96a69/66e945dd/684787235/VEsB/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrj-0FxK19tgUR2EbHkBBGg/videos") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525677/45c30650/1f7c96a69/66e945dc/684787235/VEsO/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.flickr.com/photos/elizabethwarren") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525677/45c30650/1f7c96a69/66e945df/684787235/VEsP/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://medium.com/@teamwarren")
---|---|---|---|---|---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Joe=20Reynolds=202020?=
subject: Campaigning in the time of corona
body:
Like most Americans we are adapting to our new circumstances. | | | |
---
**IT'S OFFICIAL**
* * *
**Joe is registered to be on the Repubican primary ballot for US Senate!**
---
| | | During this time of uncertainty with our nation's heath, our economy, and how we recover from the impacts of the corona virus, Denise and I hope everyone is contacting reliable heath and local government sources to get information and find support. We have witnessed an amazing array of community mobilization efforts working to ensure those in isolation have what they need, doing what they can to keep our small businesses afloat, coming up with creative ways to help employees of affected industries cope with being out of work, and sending entertaining, positive messages across social media networks. Be safe, be well, and reach out to these sources if you need help.
---
| [https://www.scdhec.gov](https://reynolds2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=916b511ece2bb92a8c0d875a1&id=991c844044&e=6e84008331) South Carolina Department of Health and Environmental Control
[https://www.cdc.gov](https://reynolds2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=916b511ece2bb92a8c0d875a1&id=d3ed7da837&e=6e84008331) Centers for Disease Control
---
|
---
| **Here's a recap of how we've been reaching new supporters of********Team Reynolds **
* Joe participated in his first candidate forum hosted by the Berkeley County GOP. Questions were supplied by The Citadel Republican Society. Watch the event here: [https://drive.google.com/file/d/1GRDrHrZCUte47eMCGQ0KCuMP9lzzrHw6/view?usp=sharing](https://reynolds2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=916b511ece2bb92a8c0d875a1&id=baf39e92f5&e=6e84008331)
* We attended the 3rd annual Black History Month Celebration co-hosted by the Charleston County GOP and The Citadel Republican Society who also invited Joe to speak at one of their monthly meetings.
* Joe had an opinion piece published in The City Paper. Read here: [https://www.charlestoncitypaper.com/charleston/sc-general-assembly-must-act-now-and-delay-state-primary/Content?oid=30984991&fbclid=IwAR2qInyajiifYPoRNjIlxKE5vxc8nTZI1Sh-IaR_EFqzriUWxzKRXimTYuo](https://reynolds2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=916b511ece2bb92a8c0d875a1&id=bc6bcdbe62&e=6e84008331)
* We met hundreds of voters during the run up to our First in the South presidential primary outside the debate, the town halls, and the Trump rally.
* We traveled to Washington DC to take part in the Summit on Principled Conservatism sponsored by Principles First and Stand Up Republic to discuss the future of the Republican Party.
* Joe did a radio interview with host Kelly Golden. Listen in at the 13:50 mark here: [https://943wsc.iheart.com/featured/kelly-golden/content/2020-03-04-hes-ready-to-dethrone-senator-lindsey-graham-listen/?fbclid=IwAR3d3vMl5jeWcVrQRMVt64Pf5yZB5Py_LOSjNchD_Tqut9YeKLnvJE6CNcs](https://reynolds2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=916b511ece2bb92a8c0d875a1&id=3cc76b3585&e=6e84008331)
* We continued finding local events like farmers markets, Friends of the Library book sales, neighborhood clean-ups, and even an Enduro race where Joe ran into an old schoolmate from the USMMA in a plowed cotton field in the middle of rural Aiken County!

---
| | | | [](https://reynolds2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=916b511ece2bb92a8c0d875a1&id=059960c12e&e=6e84008331)
---
[](https://reynolds2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=916b511ece2bb92a8c0d875a1&id=ef2025ed13&e=6e84008331)
---
[](https://reynolds2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=916b511ece2bb92a8c0d875a1&id=20bc6027df&e=6e84008331)
---
[](https://reynolds2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=916b511ece2bb92a8c0d875a1&id=270e43dec1&e=6e84008331)
---
[](mailto:joe@reynolds2020.com)
---
|
---
| We, like most of you, are adapting during this difficult time. Our campaign has always been about getting out as often as possible to the places where people gather. We have spoken face to face with over 11,000 people and that strategy has now come to an abrupt halt. In response we have invested in some digital billboards and will expand our social media advertising, both of which will stretch our budget in unexpected ways. Don't miss reading Joe's article linked above about postponing the primary election.

Our boots on the ground interactions with people show a soft 2% - 10% support level for Lindsey Graham. If you are receiving this newsletter, we know you are a supporter of Team Reynolds and we appreciate all the ways you help us where you can. We only have until June 9 to reach as many people as possible. So if you are able, please continue to **_Give_** ,_**Like**_ , and **_Share_** to help us spread the campaign.

---
|
---
WE HAVE YARD SIGNS, T-SHIRTS, AND STICKERS TO
SHOW YOUR SUPPORT TOO!
| | | | | | | [](https://reynolds2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=916b511ece2bb92a8c0d875a1&id=9ebaa70c48&e=6e84008331) | [Share](https://reynolds2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=916b511ece2bb92a8c0d875a1&id=279972e725&e=6e84008331)

---|---

name: Lisa Scheller (personal)
subject: FWD: We’re in this together.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
Making sure you saw this from my campaign manager. I’ve decided to hit pause on all of our in-person campaign activities. We’re doing our part to sto Hey Peter, making sure you saw this from my campaign manager.
I’ve decided to hit pause on all of our in-person campaign activities. We’re doing our part to stop the spread of the coronavirus – but we’re asking for your help with our campaign.
Sign up here to help make calls and get the word out about our campaign. Election day is approaching and we’re asking for a few minutes of your time to make a BIG difference.
Thanks in advance.
Lisa Peter, I hope that you and your family are well during these trying times. As Pennsylvania, the United States, and the world confront the coronavirus pandemic,**Lisa has evaluated the situation and decided to suspend any in-person events going forward. **
Lisa wanted you to know that this decision **does not** come lightly. She is committed to meeting all members of our Lehigh Valley community and sharing her ideas for our country’s future – but now is the time to focus on the present danger we face.
Lisa has made it clear; we need to watch out for each other, help protect the most vulnerable groups – anyone immunocompromised or our senior citizens – because ultimately **we are all in this together**.
Lisa has asked me, to ask two things from you today, Peter:
First and foremost: Please wash your hands. Cover your coughs. Practice social distancing. Do what you can to make sure that you, your family, and your neighbors remain as healthy as possible.
Second, our campaign is still pushing forward, Peter. While we are not meeting face-to-face with voters, our efforts to spread the word about the problems our district faces and solutions Lisa wants to bring to Washington must continue.
[**That is why we are asking supporters to consider making calls for our campaign from your homes.**** **](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=767e9f56e6834c1c912c40fae82f9406&_e=BYy1ZmMIFRgsG_aqzkfdCjavoYB7X_QFM9wMjaNNOWxIess-rE1KDIK2BMDLB1pXvyQ3Foj7oU2CyTlwn1vgTptqdeQVQLT4zMG8GHEpnr5n44YvU5IkM0btoOL4PyAs7ftNXuBYX-PmIDUmsiD2-E5vPqhCzq0jqDp1ycNAeNj7u9rHftMQBPSfJJvAPZNPuuPu2TpZ62tQ1FI_MZpddjtOPRCUZyrUptKJ7svNhyy8Os_wsfnOszEy00llFOXpp1uFUR5SRGXAKDQ8131m65Netd6hdHKg8qo0ZOv4rRsIyDm-xSmm4kfzvIH4AJYmg8gD-STNASzFBw3qcx5E7Qxy07cgEjVSEcuw2RsyAAL97mVcEhUuJfnMnzopupHVXAvhlctQN9z51NlaVEif5GhOA2Sny8DrTcVhr-zzIqA%3D)
As we near election day, instead of door knocking, attending events, or donating money – we’re asking you to talk to your neighbors about Lisa’s candidacy. **[Please take a few minutes out of your day to help get the word out about Lisa and her plans for the Lehigh Valley.](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=767e9f56e6834c1c912c40fae82f9406&_e=BYy1ZmMIFRgsG_aqzkfdCjavoYB7X_QFM9wMjaNNOWxIess-rE1KDIK2BMDLB1pXvyQ3Foj7oU2CyTlwn1vgTptqdeQVQLT4zMG8GHEpnr5n44YvU5IkM0btoOL4PyAs7ftNXuBYX-PmIDUmsiD2-E5vPqhCzq0jqDp1ycNAeNj7u9rHftMQBPSfJJvAPZNPVCIFC-RIA6BocMaNcN1Oh7jDIl3Q-GzSFzbGBgiQzhjMqkKpzk3YQuGs6fsMFbNMUi4ZDduFYJZoWRgIVpn_QwSer_yJi6F8w6xwkbT7R7ai2Il3YvwnU0eXqLDCSFwkkC3a1WmCxniUYUkK2SEG7vRVAcoWGJ1CXLEvlLbf13b3f29IpvWppynH381cc0UZkWpjfZqQsX5-2AlsjJQnd0HaYSXlEC6D27y7K_5uv48%3D)**
Thank you for your continued support and the energy you’re putting behind Lisa and our campaign. She is ready to fight for Pennsylvania and our Lehigh Valley community, and looks forward to continuing to promote her ideas once we beat this virus once and for all.

clean_body: Making sure you saw this from my campaign manager. I’ve decided to hit pause on all of our in-person campaign activities. We’re doing our part to sto Hey Peter, making sure you saw this from my campaign manager. I’ve decided to hit pause on all of our in-person campaign activities. We’re doing our part to stop the spread of the coronavirus – but we’re asking for your help with our campaign. Sign up here to help make calls and get the word out about our campaign. Election day is approaching and we’re asking for a few minutes of your time to make a BIG difference. Thanks in advance. Lisa Peter, I hope that you and your family are well during these trying times. As Pennsylvania, the United States, and the world confront the coronavirus pandemic,Lisa has evaluated the situation and decided to suspend any in-person events going forward. Lisa wanted you to know that this decision does not come lightly. She is committed to meeting all members of our Lehigh Valley community and sharing her ideas for our country’s future – but now is the time to focus on the present danger we face. Lisa has made it clear; we need to watch out for each other, help protect the most vulnerable groups – anyone immunocompromised or our senior citizens – because ultimately we are all in this together. Lisa has asked me, to ask two things from you today, Peter: First and foremost: Please wash your hands. Cover your coughs. Practice social distancing. Do what you can to make sure that you, your family, and your neighbors remain as healthy as possible. Second, our campaign is still pushing forward, Peter. While we are not meeting face-to-face with voters, our efforts to spread the word about the problems our district faces and solutions Lisa wants to bring to Washington must continue. As we near election day, instead of door knocking, attending events, or donating money – we’re asking you to talk to your neighbors about Lisa’s candidacy. Thank you for your continued support and the energy you’re putting behind Lisa and our campaign. She is ready to fight for Pennsylvania and our Lehigh Valley community, and looks forward to continuing to promote her ideas once we beat this virus once and for all. All the best, Alex Meyer Lisa Scheller for Congress Campaign Manager Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc.

Friend,
By now, you are aware of the COVID-19 global pandemic and **the importance of social distancing to flatten the curve of people infected**. As of this writing, there are 137 confirmed cases in North Carolina.
Limiting the spread of coronavirus will require everyone to pitch in and do their part. **There are a number of things YOU can do to take care of our community** :
| | |
---|---
## Check on friends and family
Some people will experience social isolation during this pandemic. Reach out to them and let them know you care. Social distancing may be challenging, but it also affords the chance to connect with loved ones.
If you are the caregiver for a relative or friend, try to keep yourself healthy, for your sake and their health. [Click here for CDC guidelines on taking care of someone at home.](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzgxMzQ4ODA5NDM4NjY0MTk5JmM9cDZ6NyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzAwMzM4NzQmZD1mNm4yczV2.k0AJLwX45RbNTEzA1wiJFdvTp0SbPC3JNDuCtSvCx3E)
| | |
---|---
## Volunteer
**If you can volunteer safely, please try and do so. The need is great.**
There are several charities in the 13th District on the frontlines of responding to COVID-19 who need volunteers. **If you know of other charities besides those listed here, hit REPLY and let us know!**
Check out [The Volunteer Center](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzgxMzQ4ODA5NDM4NjY0MTk5JmM9cDZ6NyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzAwMzM4NzYmZD1hNmI4YTFw.4fLwfxJ3fZID6sq7pmc_pLw8wc5WeqpVSHbkRBYu2R4) to find a local charity you can get involved in!
| | |
## Meels on Wheels
_Provides free meals to seniors_ [Alamance](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzgxMzQ4ODA5NDM4NjY0MTk5JmM9cDZ6NyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzAwMzM4NzgmZD1uNXcweDNl.lLMjtFvrSE61M0mdez21pOobTz1NlTe76boRCKEJj-Y) [Caswell](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzgxMzQ4ODA5NDM4NjY0MTk5JmM9cDZ6NyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzAwMzM4ODAmZD1jOGo3azJ2.b7lGaOe7v7r6OHf9v2VhOVDEgdycr4RYEOPGLmxygpM) [Davie](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzgxMzQ4ODA5NDM4NjY0MTk5JmM9cDZ6NyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzAwMzM4ODImZD1lOW0wbjZr.4u2RDTr55CMwEdoHJ7zLBIiIe0xbZvk5JnBB5trG4xI) [Davidson](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzgxMzQ4ODA5NDM4NjY0MTk5JmM9cDZ6NyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzAwMzM4ODQmZD1sOW03Zzhv.1RniBFigerSAp4ihJiQ466QdgGwCZXT5EOxsTHPOwQk) [Guilford](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzgxMzQ4ODA5NDM4NjY0MTk5JmM9cDZ6NyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzAwMzM4ODYmZD10MHE3bTVx.JPYMQHHJQFZsy8O46mOM4l_-N-Zf6evkviMmevvHegg) [Iredell](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzgxMzQ4ODA5NDM4NjY0MTk5JmM9cDZ6NyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzAwMzM4ODgmZD1wMXg3YjNz.7paMBv8gtQnwMEvA_aPwaIctZbTyy4FkLTsxBgcdID8) [Person](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzgxMzQ4ODA5NDM4NjY0MTk5JmM9cDZ6NyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzAwMzM4OTAmZD1nM3AwYjBq.60t_XR40h1NbiokFcKUelGh1CNxkTPprZIjR9OlkcyA) [Randolph](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzgxMzQ4ODA5NDM4NjY0MTk5JmM9cDZ6NyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzAwMzM4OTImZD1hOXQzZTRv.j6SwUtQP6ZoQGOmRG7VsTTxUktQD5WEfjrj3a8glSZA) [Rowan](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzgxMzQ4ODA5NDM4NjY0MTk5JmM9cDZ6NyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzAwMzM4OTQmZD1wNGo0bjR5.WAdUcstSwdDYz32cTxm3-bT7Ak6EQaDga0a6V1Zt5Gs)
---
## The Salvation Army
_Provides aid to families, food, and runs soup kitchens_ [Alamance](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzgxMzQ4ODA5NDM4NjY0MTk5JmM9cDZ6NyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzAwMzM4OTYmZD11OXQ5ajhy.0huU2jOMbYslj1NStfQdoIoTRNmqyCb6yPhkRXIiXRU) [Caswell](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzgxMzQ4ODA5NDM4NjY0MTk5JmM9cDZ6NyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzAwMzM4OTgmZD1vOW03bzBp.oCuHAtpYjt3rEum_43gmgdb1Ti-umYiXc-XpmaIEnkU) [Davie](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzgxMzQ4ODA5NDM4NjY0MTk5JmM9cDZ6NyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzAwMzM5MDAmZD1uOXgyaDhk.lUYvnP21hknQpXQngC-SP74ACg-MwWUkgRDnIUkQuU4) [Davidson](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzgxMzQ4ODA5NDM4NjY0MTk5JmM9cDZ6NyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzAwMzM5MDImZD1rMHc5bDVy.rGjbvXRTlzqIUDwPL009Yj_KCYWdbVTi4B32xDqMx3c) [Guilford](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzgxMzQ4ODA5NDM4NjY0MTk5JmM9cDZ6NyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzAwMzM5MDQmZD1lM3A2cDJt.I3nBk5tbKYH3WUZXgMEpGT3eSbRnxHnBxTFlFpWACNo) [Iredell](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzgxMzQ4ODA5NDM4NjY0MTk5JmM9cDZ6NyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzAwMzM5MDYmZD1rNnYyeThh.bbyoIU9UivL9rDe-_L45tSDmlIKTOKToOmRd2FNAC5M) [Person](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzgxMzQ4ODA5NDM4NjY0MTk5JmM9cDZ6NyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzAwMzM5MDgmZD1iNXgzejVu.dJsI2er_tSmC6NHWmR3n7J0DXvnW4FmoxTkbnuw1900) [Randolph](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzgxMzQ4ODA5NDM4NjY0MTk5JmM9cDZ6NyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzAwMzM5MTAmZD11NnE0bjhp.ax8oEhm6ycl78RRQtMVD5AuRaA2pim3lfJaFC6DmJzk) [Rowan](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzgxMzQ4ODA5NDM4NjY0MTk5JmM9cDZ6NyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzAwMzM5MTImZD1lMHkxYjd6.lanPCk-nKQZZVE5A2mVsARugfsIQbAHpEnjUZExyLOg)
---
| | |
---|---
## Help Small Business
Small businesses will bear the brunt of this challenging period. Local and family-owned businesses are a part of the fabric of our community and will need our help to weather this pandemic. [Find one of your favorite local restaurants in the Triad offering take-out, delivery, or curbide service.](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzgxMzQ4ODA5NDM4NjY0MTk5JmM9cDZ6NyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzAwMzM5MTQmZD11MW4xdzNu.i_XZqxy3b13qLyrRppA65YwF5QGqbs21GEG113bardc)
For small business owners, the Small Business Administration is offering assistance to overcome the temporary loss of revenue.
Click [here](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzgxMzQ4ODA5NDM4NjY0MTk5JmM9cDZ6NyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzAwMzM5MTYmZD1nMWEwZTJi.buZ2dX5PmXvUGoKGBIxUIlHlg1oZ-RMksbSEaYoMMiU) to apply for a Small Business Administration disaster relief loan.
Stay tuned for more news as we work to provide additional help to all those who are suffering.
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Heidi?=
subject: 🌹 A better world is possible. Will you keep fighting?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI FOR CONGRESS
body:
I've met a lot of wonderful people and organizations along the way | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/heidifor25/a-better-world-is-possible-will-you-keep-fighting?e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| | | [ ](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=27de241f65&e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| | | Dear Neighbors, Today, we’ll be closing down this account. But it only seems fitting that before we do so, we make sure that the incredible community we have all built here continues to grow and continues to organize for the world that we all deserve. Here are existing opportunities for that important, on-going work. This list is not comprehensive. In fact, it is just me listing off communities of leaders that I have encountered and support as they work to build power amongst regular folks like us. Reach out. Plug in. Stay in touch with folks you have met along the way. Never stop fighting. I’ll see you there. Solidarity Forever. Heidi Sloan
_Housing Justice_ [_Homes Not Handcuffs_](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=b62d6ec177&e=c169cb0a8e) : To replace cruel and punitive responses to homelessness in Austin with housing and community. [_BASTA_](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=81c8c79068&e=c169cb0a8e) : Tenant Organizing in ATX. _Criminal Justice Reform_ [_Texas Advocates for Justice_](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=015bb583a9&e=c169cb0a8e) : Organizing in community with justice involved people for a world with fewer cages and more healing. [_Texas Organizing Project_](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=fb9e8d0843&e=c169cb0a8e) Organizing across Texas around criminal justice, immigration and education to name a few. [_Austin Justice Coalition_](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=553d8386b6&e=c169cb0a8e) : _The_ place to organize around a better police union contract in Austin...and so much more. [_Mano Amiga_](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=dbdfc29ef0&e=c169cb0a8e) : Organizing for Cite & Release as well as a Public Defender’s Office in Hays County. [_Free Rodney Reed:_](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=7cf012c021&e=c169cb0a8e) Because of you we did not lose Rodney to execution in 2019. Now let’s bring this Texan home to his family. [_Jose Garza_](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=829f17979a&e=c169cb0a8e) : My friend, running for District Attorney in Austin on a platform of ending cash bail, non-prosecution of low level possession, and fixing our broken criminal justice system _Immigration_ [_Grassroots Leadership_](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=2ab75d6789&e=c169cb0a8e) : No new prisons. No detention centers. Fighting for real change with and for the people. [_United We Dream_](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=e3ef986d7f&e=c169cb0a8e) : Youth led organizing space, particularly around DACA. [_Worker’s Defense Project_](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=d32167e7bb&e=c169cb0a8e) : Organizing and Empowering low income workers, particularly from the immigrant community. _Labor & Workers Rights_ [_Young Active Labor Leaders_](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=1418f630fd&e=c169cb0a8e) : Growing leaders and fighters to win a stronger labor movement. [_Worker’s Defense Project_](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=f5ab13e953&e=c169cb0a8e) : Organizing and Empowering low income workers, particularly from the immigrant community. [_Unite Here Local 23_](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=62ce94d434&e=c169cb0a8e) : Ft. Worth based Union of airline catering workers, fighting for health care, safe working conditions, and dignified wages. [_Organize Austin_](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=f24dd2cf4c&e=c169cb0a8e) : Ongoing campaign for workers at Thundercloud Subs in Austin to win a union! _Reproductive Justice_
[_NARAL_](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=84725cc8be&e=c169cb0a8e) National community fighting for reproductive freedom [_Lilith Fund_](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=bdc5ec448f&e=c169cb0a8e) Provides financial and emotional support for folks who need abortions in Texas [_The Afiya Center_](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=fb19db46a6&e=c169cb0a8e) : Organizing for reproductive justice centering black women of Texas. [_DSA Feminist Action Committee_](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=52ff47de3b&e=c169cb0a8e) : badass, intersectional feminist organizers currently raising dollars for abortion funds! _Environmentalism (The Green New Deal)_ [_The Sunrise Movement_](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=22b559ddcb&e=c169cb0a8e) : A youth led (but all inclusive) movement to address climate crisis with climate justice and millions of new jobs. [_Austin Hub_](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=ab68cd8adc&e=c169cb0a8e) : The incredible local chapter of the Sunrise Movement. Organizing for a Green New Deal locally, nationally and internationally. _International _ [_Code Pink_](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=ee1f4c6397&e=c169cb0a8e) at UT: Leading a campaign for the University of Texas to divest from fossil fuels as well as weapons manufacturers. _Education_ [_Education Austin_](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=d42e23f32f&e=c169cb0a8e) : Union representing Austin’s educators and school workers. Leading on the premise that their working conditions are student’s learning conditions. Follow to stay active on school closure discussions in AISD. [_Center for Public Policy Priorities_](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=2ef5dde1ec&e=c169cb0a8e) : Public Policy to envision a Texas that works for everyone, not just the wealthy few. Focus on education, healthcare, and economic justice. _LGBTQIA+ Liberation_ [_Wimberley Pride_](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=138fae1696&e=c169cb0a8e) : Students in Wimberley are demanding safe and supportive learning for everyone. Here’s your chance to stand with them. Also keep an eye on the Wimberley School board. _Disability Justice_ [_ADAPT_](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=6ec7dd4d69&e=c169cb0a8e) : Organizing around disability rights for human dignity, worker’s rights, health justice and solidarity. _Health Justice_ [_DSA’s Medicare for All Campaign_](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=1fbfdaf1fd&e=c169cb0a8e) : Organize to win Medicare for All by pressuring elected congressional representatives into doing what’s right. Contains a handy toolkit that I can personally recommend. [_Working Texans for Paid Sick Time_](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=160c64c773&e=c169cb0a8e) : Time to kick Ken Paxton into gear and get Texans what they deserve: the right to earned paid sick time at EVERY SINGLE WORKPLACE.
_Economic Justice & Building Working Class Power_ [_Democratic Socialists of America_](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=40056a9ded&e=c169cb0a8e) : We believe that no person should be poor so that another can be rich. [_Austin DSA_](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=1955f14408&e=c169cb0a8e) : Organizing for power in the working class. [_Bernie Sanders_](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=04d86b6fd3&e=c169cb0a8e) : We have a world to win.

But it only seems fitting that before we do so, we make sure that the incredible community we have all built here continues to grow and continues to organize for the world that we all deserve. Here are existing opportunities for that important, on-going work. This list is not comprehensive. In fact, it is just me listing off communities of leaders that I have encountered and support as they work to build power amongst regular folks like us. Reach out. Plug in. Stay in touch with folks you have met along the way. Never stop fighting. I’ll see you there. Solidarity Forever. Fighting for real change with and for the people. : Youth led organizing space, particularly around DACA. : Organizing and Empowering low income workers, particularly from the immigrant community. subject: Lindstrom / Eisenhower Event Canceled
body:
Your help is still needed | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lindstromforsenate.com/lindstrom-eisenhower-event-canceled?e=41f8e27552)
---
| |
---
| _**From the Desk of**
**Earl & Libby Julo**_

We were pleased to host the upcoming reception for Republican U.S. Senate candidate Dave Lindstrom and special guest Mary Jean Eisenhower in our home scheduled for Thursday, March 26th. However, with the CDC advising against gatherings of 10 or more people for the immediate future, we regretfully must postpone this event.

** Dave’s campaign is pushing hard for a strong end of the first quarter finance report and we are asking that you consider contributing to Dave's campaign before the March 31st deadline.**

You may contribute online by clicking the button below or visiting www.LindstromforSenate.com. You can also mail your check payable to: "Lindstrom for Senate"; 13725 Metcalf Avenue, Suite 324; Overland Park, KS 66223.

Thank you for your understanding and we look forward to rescheduling this event and seeing you soon. Please stay safe and join with us and so many of our fellow Americans in praying for a quick and favorable resolution to the health crisis facing our nation.

Sincerely.

Earl & Libby Julo

name: Kathy Manning
subject: Campaign updates in response to COVID-19
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
During these difficult times, it is critical that we share important information.
|
---

| | Friends, During these difficult times, it is critical that we share important information, encourage each other to take appropriate actions to stay healthy, reach out to those who are isolated, and remember that we will get through this together. That's why I'm reaching out to you. **First, some health updates**. Last week I sent you an email with guidance we'd received from the CDC and the North Carolina Department of Health and Human Services in response to COVID-19. Since then, we've received additional guidance from state and federal leaders. **-> **If you're feeling sick, call your primary care doctor before seeking a COVID-19 test. If you don't have a primary care doctor, call your county health department for guidance. Guilford County: 336-641-7777 Forsyth County: 336-703-3249 **->** K-12 schools are closed until at least March 31st. **->** The UNC System has postponed May graduation ceremonies. **->** NC DHHS and the CDC are recommending no gatherings of 50 people or more for at least eight weeks. For questions and updates from NC DHHS, please call 2-1-1 or visit [_**https://www.ncdhhs.gov/divisions/public-health/coronavirus-disease-2019-covid-19-response-north-carolina.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d342/3d199a51/2f62e3d1/7364f114/4057268074/VEsH/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.ncdhhs.gov/divisions/public-health/coronavirus-disease-2019-covid-19-response-north-carolina") **Second, we know that many people have already felt the impact of COVID-19 through job loss and decreased business.** -> If you've lost your job, been furloughed, or had your hours cut back drastically due to coronavirus, [_**apply for unemployment benefits here**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d342/3d199a51/2f62e3d1/7364f115/4057268074/VEsE/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "http://des.nc.gov"). -> If you're a small business owner whose business has been harmed by coronavirus, [_**apply for a disaster relief loan here.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d342/3d199a51/2f62e3d1/7364f112/4057268074/VEsF/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://disasterloan.sba.gov") -> If you need information about food assistance, utilities, broadband or relief resources, get a [_**full list of community resources here.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d342/3d199a51/2f62e3d1/7364f113/4057268074/VEsC/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://docs.google.com/document/d/1qchydZbTq2Ovg6n0ZCAlWf4DSk7pFTD4136Y2_0yqJQ/edit?usp=sharing") **Third, if you are home with kids whose schools have been closed, are trying to work productively from home, or are just trying to maintain a sense of calm, get a list of activities and ideas here:** _**Resources for Kids at Home**_
* Even when schools are closed, you can keep the learning going with these [_**free online educational activities.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d342/3d199a51/2f62e3d1/7364f110/4057268074/VEsD/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "http://link.emailmessage.me/ls/click?upn=L2yQGTMrJpMNcjFPkzA1BjZEmCMvpqNl8iSqNsMYaOZFHQJMzDh2pqhG-2FonYrGTnublk1G4G1ArLSQ04C8ZUjIHpV7G70bf-2Bxd759UXy2GY-3DIvbv_SwpJwcocxEtb8hYEA3O5ZUG8pwIVIyLqnHePYks04QywQjZKAkzxEem-2BM4PhqK-2BGirCCgoMNnUGHt2HRaraMvhoMXTUzXhF2fJaFmbdOqB3acBAE0ZWeQzteqMDmyj9mnKNaFLs0pCkuS4UoBHpL0JbNJWGF3bTzNve96Ysq-2FZi-2BfttuNwkhvSYnEp5u9Pe18Y9dz6E01-2BLuoOihknfracgSzaGy0gaGLnHKKsTbncmvvGQ3jXpI0q6lbkPgB3kf55tt3BQfmWSAla-2BYv01rEOc0ukVZQHV-2Fk4jR1HpLi1o-3D")
* Take a[ _**virtual tour of famous museums**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d342/3d199a51/2f62e3d1/7364f111/4057268074/VEsA/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "http://link.emailmessage.me/ls/click?upn=krvF0hFuJdmpeToQj878ar8pAEQOKjQnEly9C4Z2F19ls-2BsJ-2Bk1mUVWN70E6iidIK5aEAVYqCzu0Tsm1LIsT9mMX5GNGOiSQe39Zmy17mti4OaIW9mGmlIWbnQr8zpiHFAEA_SwpJwcocxEtb8hYEA3O5ZUG8pwIVIyLqnHePYks04QywQjZKAkzxEem-2BM4PhqK-2BGirCCgoMNnUGHt2HRaraMvhoMXTUzXhF2fJaFmbdOqB3acBAE0ZWeQzteqMDmyj9mnKNaFLs0pCkuS4UoBHpL0LuoxXW8WrllsLSkfFXKpqu8f31ZURt-2BgPBTd9Myb8sz5qgQROYTUBvsHQs0WB9wC1ZdvkD9BGNdXNt69OKJOjBSKNVzlYCEc-2F6T-2FYfcrj1UZZe3pitQhV6DiY6D-2FwIHojRYBnsuorkznrWpa4Ieqqc-3D") from home.
* [_**Yoga and mindfulness**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d342/3d199a51/2f62e3d1/7364f10e/4057268074/VEsB/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "http://link.emailmessage.me/ls/click?upn=krvF0hFuJdmpeToQj878ak6p5mj3LQC8gxypOeyy9BnvdT91NddHQsrEaoW5LLfAdWZB-2F6T3dECwM0OFWxTtug-3D-3DJHxd_SwpJwcocxEtb8hYEA3O5ZUG8pwIVIyLqnHePYks04QywQjZKAkzxEem-2BM4PhqK-2BGirCCgoMNnUGHt2HRaraMvhoMXTUzXhF2fJaFmbdOqB3acBAE0ZWeQzteqMDmyj9mnKNaFLs0pCkuS4UoBHpL0HmqGCoG0Yn6v4sd0UHtTPBht7JWNPBI-2BLtQ-2B3OyDynWEVV5Mnr51hTNqT6Embtpc0h-2FA1E5wDD7FfIFsR79-2B2sNLCxhyjh9Q1ACOC43tZB5SiA2Tsy8BrmXBFyAeq1bivlg0vHo9qR9Pe30JRXI4TI-3D") online adventures for kids.
* _**[Rivet](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d342/3d199a51/2f62e3d1/7364f10f/4057268074/VEsO/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "http://link.emailmessage.me/ls/click?upn=LAYHN8s2jDQX-2B72YXF5vEISjElHj-2FKrFPnzK1XGN30Id0VA-2BrGX9Xtjgk1FP-2FnFF92Sw9MzvRwNNfMix1O3RPsbO6bOr1lnmBM2Wq1KPzGrVxXZg0GPalMuBcXYNc60O-2Big-2BnlA9BRaoNUMzR-2F9m-2BUwjGtGTmT71jouJEInA5thcZUX4vb3c5Axtk-2B4tKuNaVhAADplGIdxn8SD1Rq4DXZtCocbySh58-2BKghtUchvgP3WGu3ZWLYrAtMG0h2ST87lj8DxGYO42XV71bFOBQt0cAdM5z6EDe-2B6KQTCQAGrBuZGaq-2FBKTcCIU6VXCJrjULTFR3HTXQGbH-2Bc64MOR3nQ-2FD9uE97Mqg-2FTWn17WcJMlXVe-2BK1KMRg1svOpYNkY4CJvNvx_SwpJwcocxEtb8hYEA3O5ZUG8pwIVIyLqnHePYks04QywQjZKAkzxEem-2BM4PhqK-2BGirCCgoMNnUGHt2HRaraMvhoMXTUzXhF2fJaFmbdOqB3acBAE0ZWeQzteqMDmyj9mnKNaFLs0pCkuS4UoBHpL0LVQpmLkucp3a3-2BOvHSU-2FfoqiEDudUF1Yocy-2FVlKuvJnpm3qUPEiLM8jo8bW0XJ1mQ8FDqT0-2BUJg7QzcG-2B805UPs1pWj-2BJww-2F6DC2O-2FFPh-2F5m15lZhxzF507KPC2f9hIlUp7VVdvepfX56P5jAF8tYg-3D")**_ , a free reading practice app for kids.
* Over 20 other ideas for _**[family-friendly stay-at-home activities](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d342/3d199a51/2f62e3d1/7364f10c/4057268074/VEsP/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "http://link.emailmessage.me/ls/click?upn=krvF0hFuJdmpeToQj878auwWqBNJm3SSvSEVpa-2BI-2B4vIM5NFffUA07HB6MNFSM2wbgNx7BsHhxNf9RHpK-2BIxO2d4VqDKTantP9bEWdGUjX4-3D9orz_SwpJwcocxEtb8hYEA3O5ZUG8pwIVIyLqnHePYks04QywQjZKAkzxEem-2BM4PhqK-2BGirCCgoMNnUGHt2HRaraMvhoMXTUzXhF2fJaFmbdOqB3acBAE0ZWeQzteqMDmyj9mnKNaFLs0pCkuS4UoBHpL0BQF1rxaercDglq6aTV9lkX69BgF0BFBdi3NZI26Jo1z6oVWkRepR-2Bidr-2B2x-2B4crvbacus9lFtfVLsiPlkg3URy76oxTbKFbZB-2F9eQUhuZAD2AO-2BQP1Z8wDv-2BU7pOEyK9vRNfKlUV-2BS1bapByT24A2s-3D").**_

_**Personal Wellbeing**_
* Parenting groups [_**Mindful Return**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d342/3d199a51/2f62e3d1/7364f10d/4057268074/VEsHBQ/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA
